name: sandcastle-max
description: AFK Claude Code agents en Docker contra tu Claude Max subscription (vía CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN, workaround para Sandcastle issue #191 wontfix). v0.7.0: anti-mock + reality-first testing. .sandcastle/resources.json declara recursos externos (DB/HTTP/queue/etc) con policy mandatory|optional; 3 niveles de defensa: Level 1 host pre-flight probe (abort dispatch si falla), Level 2 container connectivity probe (BLOCKED RESOURCE_UNREACHABLE), Level 3 schema diff vs brief (BLOCKED SCHEMA_MISMATCH). runtime/main.mts propaga env_required al agentEnv. Prompt template enforza red-green-reality-first per acceptance criterion (TEST_NOOP block si el test pasa sin código). v0.6.0 stack-aware scaffold sigue vigente: Dockerfile compuesto per-project desde snippets (base + runtimes detectados + agent layer con UID surgery). Soporta .NET, Node, Bun, Python, Go, Ruby, Rust y polyglot. Orchestrator en plugin (runtime/), repo del usuario solo tiene .sandcastle/. Slash commands: /sandcastle-init, /sandcastle-build, /sandcastle-run, /sandcastle-dispatch-wave, /sandcastle-merge-wave, /sandcastle-pipeline. Per-project image: sandcastle-<repo-basename>.
